text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm stopping by a fast-food restaurant for lunch,
when...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ya got sixty minutes! Show 'em whatcha got,
Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I got this in the bag.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: You can do it, Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oguri is just about to take on the Super
Humongous Burger Challenge.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
The burger is free if she can finish it within sixty
minutes. Plus, she'll get a coupon to use the next
time she comes here! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And a real sweet coupon at that! It'll keep her fed
for a month!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...It will be mine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzzzzt!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hm? Sorry, I've got a call from the academy.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
What? We didn't send in part of the race
application? Y-you need me to come back now?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Say what?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...H-how can I possibly leave that behind?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following Oguri Cap's gaze, I get an eyeful of a
towering burger boasting layer upon layer of
fillings...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I feel ya, but that paper's got a deadline. You
might not turn it in on time unless you hurry!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
If I must, then... Creek! I want you... to take on
the challenge in my place!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, er... Me?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: And then give the coupon... to Tama!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: O-Oguri?! Ya can't mean that!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hm... I'm sorry, but there's no way I can do this on
my own...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: It's all good, Oguri. I 'preciate the gesture!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hrk... This... This hurts...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the three friends work together to lug the
giant burger with them back to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Very well. I don't want to let the two of you
down... Leave it to me.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I owe you one!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You guys are the best! Gahhh, I'm the happiest
Umamusume in the world!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While Super Creek manages to complete the
challenge, the excessive volume of food leaves
her immobilized for a while.
